tools.name: iibb_calculate_retention
tools.description: Pure math: compute IIBB retention amount = base × rate, with optional minimum threshold.

tools.name: iibb_calculate_perception
tools.description: Pure math: compute IIBB perception amount on a sale.

tools.name: iibb_compute_ddjj
tools.description: Assemble a monthly DDJJ from income lines + rate-book. Supports LOCAL and CM Article 2 (general).

tools.name: iibb_lookup_padron
tools.description: Lookup a CUIT's taxpayer status in a jurisdiction's padrón. Requires an adapter wired for that jurisdiction.
